message:
fix(core): correct proptest assertions in cutover_evidence tests

- guard_suite_pass_count_le_total: empty suites (0 pass, 0 fail) do not
  pass per RegressionGuardSuite::all_pass() which requires !is_empty()
- benchmark_within_threshold_consistency: fix threshold formula to match
  actual within_threshold() impl (ratio >= 1.0/threshold for higher-is-better,
  not ratio >= 1.0-threshold). 38/38 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
